properties.name: api.version
properties.description: API version string (e.g. v1, v2). Sourced from API_VERSION env variable.

properties.name: api.base-path
properties.description: Full API base path prefix used in all controllers (e.g. /api/v1).

properties.name: admin.username
properties.description: Username for the default admin account created on first startup.

properties.name: admin.password
properties.description: Password for the default admin account created on first startup.

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key for signing JWT tokens.

properties.name: jwt.access-token-expiration-minutes
properties.description: Access token expiration time in minutes.

properties.name: jwt.refresh-token-expiration-minutes
properties.description: Refresh token expiration time in minutes.

properties.name: file.upload-dir
properties.description: Local directory path for uploaded receipt images.

properties.name: cloudinary.cloud-name
properties.description: Cloudinary cloud name. Leave empty to use local storage.

properties.name: cloudinary.folder
properties.description: Cloudinary folder name for uploaded receipts.
